<script>
    document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
        if (e.target.closest('.merger-popup-close')) {
            e.target.closest('.merger-popup-overlay').remove();
            sessionStorage.setItem('merger-popup-closed', 'true');
        }
        if (e.target.matches('.merger-popup-overlay')) {
            e.target.remove();
            sessionStorage.setItem('merger-popup-closed', 'true');
        }
    });

    if (sessionStorage.getItem('merger-popup-closed')) {
        document.querySelector('.merger-popup-overlay').remove();
    }
</script>
